allow: Bash(mkdir -p docs app scripts && echo "dirs created")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import sqlalchemy, alembic, dotenv; print\('sqlalchemy', sqlalchemy.__version__\); print\('alembic', alembic.__version__\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pip install -r requirements.txt -q --trusted-host pypi.org --trusted-host files.pythonhosted.org --trusted-host pypi.python.org)
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import sqlalchemy, alembic, dotenv; print\('SQLAlchemy', sqlalchemy.__version__\); print\('Alembic', alembic.__version__\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from app import models; from app.db import Base; print\('tables:', len\(Base.metadata.tables\)\); [print\(' -', t\) for t in sorted\(Base.metadata.tables\)]")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect\('app.db'\); n=[r[0] for r in c.execute\(\\"select name from sqlite_master where type='table' and name!='alembic_version'\\"\)]; print\(len\(n\),'domain tables'\)")

PowerShell(python -m py_compile app/scraper/__init__.py app/scraper/selectors.py app/scraper/browser.py app/scraper/search.py app/scraper/detail.py app/scraper/run.py scripts/explore_seek.py scripts/run_scrape.py scripts/seed_saved_search.py)

PowerShell(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0,'.'\); import app.scraper; from app.scraper.run import run_daily_scrape; from app.scraper.selectors import build_search_url; print\(build_search_url\(keywords='software engineer', location='Brisbane QLD', work_type=None, page=2\)\); print\('imports OK, playwright not triggered'\)")

PowerShell(& ".\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0,'.'\); import app.scraper; from app.scraper.run import run_daily_scrape; from app.scraper.search import scrape_search; from app.scraper.detail import scrape_details; from app.scraper.selectors import build_search_url; print\(build_search_url\(keywords='software engineer', location='Brisbane QLD', work_type='Full Time', page=2\)\); print\('imports OK; playwright stayed lazy'\)")
PowerShell(& ".\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -m alembic revision --autogenerate -m "add classification and subclassification to job_listings")

PowerShell(& ".\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0,'.'\); from app.models import JobListing; from app.scraper.run import _upsert_listing; from app.scraper.search import ScrapedListing; cols=[c.name for c in JobListing.__table__.columns]; print\('classification' in cols, 'subclassification' in cols\); print\('idx ok:', any\(i.name=='idx_job_listings_classification' for i in JobListing.__table__.indexes\)\); print\('OK'\)")

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Process owning port 8080 ==="; Get-Process -Id 36892 | Select-Object Id,ProcessName,Path | Format-List; Write-Output "=== Retry proxy test over loopback \(127.0.0.1\) ==="; curl.exe -s -x http://127.0.0.1:8080 https://ipinfo.io/json --max-time 30; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "curl exit code: $LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell($py = if \(Test-Path ".venv\\Scripts\\python.exe"\) { ".venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" } else { "python" }; Write-Output "Using: $py"; & $py --version; Write-Output "=== playwright installed? ==="; & $py -c "import playwright; print\('playwright', playwright.__version__\)" 2>&1; Write-Output "=== dotenv loads PROXY_SERVER? ==="; & $py -c "import os; from dotenv import load_dotenv; load_dotenv\(\); print\('PROXY_SERVER =', os.environ.get\('PROXY_SERVER'\)\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== curl direct to PyPI \(uses Windows cert store\) ==="; curl.exe -sS -o NUL -w "HTTP %{http_code}`n" https://pypi.org/simple/playwright/ --max-time 30; Write-Output "curl exit: $LASTEXITCODE"; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== What cert bundle is pip/certifi using? ==="; .venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "import certifi; print\(certifi.where\(\)\)" 2>&1; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== Is the VPN possibly the cause? Test with curl through proxy too ==="; curl.exe -sS -o NUL -w "HTTP %{http_code}`n" -x http://127.0.0.1:8080 https://pypi.org/simple/playwright/ --max-time 30; Write-Output "curl\(proxy\) exit: $LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell(.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "from app.scraper.interactive import make_interactive_navigator, looks_like_challenge, notify_human; from app.scraper.search import scrape_search; from app.scraper.detail import scrape_details; from app.scraper.run import _upsert_listing; import inspect; print\('navigate param in scrape_search:', 'navigate' in inspect.signature\(scrape_search\).parameters\); print\('navigate param in scrape_details:', 'navigate' in inspect.signature\(scrape_details\).parameters\); print\('wiring OK'\)" 2>&1)
